title: ayenia ardua
intro: Ayenia ardua, also known as the rough ayenia, is a plant species belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ayenia ardua include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ayenia ardua is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a topical cream or ointment for its medicinal properties.
